text.title: Feature Flag Services, Testing, and Agentic Workflow Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Do you have ≥3 flags AND CI capacity to audit them?

conclusion.verdict: pick from OpenFeature / LaunchDarkly / GrowthBook / Statsig / internal

text.example: 12 flags + 3 runtimes → OpenFeature + GrowthBook provider → flag_on/off fixtures wired → 18 paired tests added → weekly audit finds 2 stale → cleanup tickets opened by agent.
